languages.text: {n}Лицо полковника дергается словно от судороги, и зарождающееся уважение во взгляде уступает место ненависти. Он не произносит ни слова, но когда его уводят, не отводит от вас взгляда.{/n}
{n}The colonel's face twitches as if in a spasm, and the budding respect in his eyes gives way to hatred. He says nothing, but as he is led away, he does not take his gaze off you.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Лицо полковника дергается словно от судороги, и зарождающееся уважение во взгляде уступает место ненависти. Он не произносит ни слова, но когда его уводят, не отводит от вас взгляда.{/n}

{n}The colonel's face twitches as if in a spasm, and the blankness in his eyes gives way to hatred. He says nothing, but as he is led away, he does not take his burning gaze off you.{/n}

languages.text: {n}大佐の顔は痙攣のように動いて、彼の目は憎悪に満ちていく。何も言わないが、引きずられていく大佐の目は、燃えるように君を見つめていた。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel's face twitches as if in a spasm, and the blankness in his eyes gives way to hatred. He says nothing, but as he is led away, he does not take his burning gaze off you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 大佐の顔は痙攣のように動いて、彼の目は憎悪に満ちていく。何も言わないが、引きずられていく大佐の目は、燃えるように君を見つめていた。

languages.text: {n}Le visage du colonel se contracte comme sous l'effet d'un spasme, et l'once de respect dans son regard laisse place à une haine farouche. Il ne dit rien, mais son regard fulminant reste braqué sur vous tandis qu'on l'escorte.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel's face twitches as if in a spasm, and the budding respect in his eyes gives way to hatred. He says nothing, but as he is led away, he does not take his gaze off you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le visage du colonel se contracte comme sous l'effet d'un spasme, et l'once de respect dans son regard laisse place à une haine farouche. Il ne dit rien, mais son regard fulminant reste braqué sur vous tandis qu'on l'escorte.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Albayın yüzü, spazm geçirir gibi seğirirken gözlerindeki saygı da yerini nefrete bırakıyor. Hiçbir şey söylemiyor ama götürüldüğü esnada bakışlarını senden ayırmıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel's face twitches as if in a spasm, and the budding respect in his eyes gives way to hatred. He says nothing, but as he is led away, he does not take his gaze off you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Albayın yüzü, spazm geçirir gibi seğirirken gözlerindeki saygı da yerini nefrete bırakıyor. Hiçbir şey söylemiyor ama götürüldüğü esnada bakışlarını senden ayırmıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Das Gesicht des Colonels zuckt, als hätte er Krämpfe, und der aufkeimende Respekt in seinen Augen weicht blankem Hass. Er sagt kein Wort, aber als er abgeführt wird, wendet er seinen Blick nicht von dir ab.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel's face twitches as if in a spasm, and the budding respect in his eyes gives way to hatred. He says nothing, but as he is led away, he does not take his gaze off you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Das Gesicht des Colonels zuckt, als hätte er Krämpfe, und der aufkeimende Respekt in seinen Augen weicht blankem Hass. Er sagt kein Wort, aber als er abgeführt wird, wendet er seinen Blick nicht von dir ab.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El rostro del coronel se contrae como en un espasmo y el respeto incipiente de sus ojos da paso al odio. No dice nada, pero no aparta su mirada de ti mientras se lo llevan.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel's face twitches as if in a spasm, and the budding respect in his eyes gives way to hatred. He says nothing, but as he is led away, he does not take his gaze off you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El rostro del coronel se contrae como en un espasmo y el respeto incipiente de sus ojos da paso al odio. No dice nada, pero no aparta su mirada de ti mientras se lo llevan.{/n}

languages.text: {n}上校的脸抽搐着，仿佛痉挛一般，眼中刚萌生的敬意瞬间被仇恨吞没。他一言不发，被带走时，目光始终死死盯着你。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel's face twitches as if in a spasm, and the budding respect in his eyes gives way to hatred. He says nothing, but as he is led away, he does not take his gaze off you.{/n}
